summary: Upgraded flutter-extractor.py to v0.1.1. Added barrel discovery (lib/amity_sdk.dart), recursive export resolution with show/hide support, and file filtering to only barrel-reachable files. Types dropped from 1172 → 325.
notes: Barrel: lib/amity_sdk.dart. 970 files excluded (not in barrel). Internal types like DbAdapterRepo, ChannelRepo, *Response no longer appear. AmityCoreClient present. Top types: AmityPermission(30), AmityAd(18), AmitySubChannel(16).
